title: ファイナルズ開催危機！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale is set to be a huge success... until
it's struck by an unexpected reversal of fortune.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The turf being grown for the race is destroyed by
days of rough weather.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the event in peril, Director Akikawa sets out
on her own to resolve the issue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna and I both wish to help, but we're
stumped as to how...
